---
title: "JupyterLab interface"
---

![](images/jupyter/Jupyter_nostradamus_homepage.png)

The [JupyterLab interface](https://jupyterlab.readthedocs.io/en/stable/user/interface.html) is made of several elements:

## Collapsible left and right sidebars

![](images/clipboard-1839719207.png)

![](images/clipboard-1173183269.png)

## Left sidebar elements

![](images/clipboard-1766125966.png)

![](images/clipboard-2407679786.png)

## Right sidebar elements

![](images/clipboard-104235443.png)

## Top menu bar

![](images/clipboard-3803124547.png)
